summary: Restore ContextJudgeMarker to judge-context-complete via seed restore.
patch:
diff --git a/internal/codebasedag/judge_context.go b/internal/codebasedag/judge_context.go
--- a/internal/codebasedag/judge_context.go
+++ b/internal/codebasedag/judge_context.go
@@ -8,3 +8,3 @@
 // ContextJudgeMarker is flipped by live DAG agents from seed-incomplete to complete.
-const ContextJudgeMarker = "seed-incomplete"
+const ContextJudgeMarker = "judge-context-complete"
